{"id":"Matter-M5CoreInk-Switch-pgq","title":"LED blink: fast=uncommissioned, slow=commissioned","description":"Replace direct LED on/off calls with a background blink driver so the LED communicates commissioning state at a glance.","design":"Implementation: esp_timer periodic timer toggling GPIO10.

New API (in app_driver.cpp / app_priv.h):
  void app_driver_led_blink_start(uint32_t half_period_ms)  // starts/restarts timer
  void app_driver_led_blink_stop(void)                       // stops timer + LED off

Blink rates:
  FAST = 250 ms half-period (2 Hz) — no fabric / commissioning window open
  SLOW = 1000 ms half-period (0.5 Hz) — commissioned

Event mapping in app_event_cb:
  kCommissioningWindowOpened  → fast blink (250 ms)
  kCommissioningWindowClosed  → stop blink
  kCommissioningComplete      → slow blink (1000 ms)
  kFabricRemoved (count==0)   → fast blink (250 ms)  [window re-opens automatically]

Boot: start fast blink if WiFi not yet provisioned (after esp_matter::start()).

Identification callback: fast blink on START/EFFECT; stop on STOP.

Remove direct app_driver_led_set() calls from app_event_cb and app_identification_cb; keep app_driver_led_set() as internal primitive.","acceptance_criteria":"LED blinks fast before commissioning, transitions to slow blink after kCommissioningComplete fires","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"venkat.venkataraju@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-20T19:09:13Z","created_by":"Venkat Venkataraju","updated_at":"2026-02-20T19:09:13Z"}

{"id":"Matter-M5CoreInk-Switch-6yf","title":"Fix crash loop: CHIP task stack + OTA requestor + BT flash","description":"Device crash-loops every ~1.2s after Matter init. No panic output, rst:0x1 (POWERON_RESET). reboot-count=40. Crash happens immediately after 'No subscriptions to resume'.","design":"Three changes to sdkconfig.defaults:
1. CONFIG_CHIP_TASK_STACK_SIZE: 6144 → 10240 (Matter+BLE+OTA needs 8-10KB)
2. CONFIG_ENABLE_OTA_REQUESTOR: y → n (heap pressure post-init)
3. Remove CONFIG_BT_CTRL_RUN_IN_FLASH_ONLY (BT WDT miss during flash cache stalls)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"venkat.venkataraju@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-20T20:23:31Z","created_by":"Venkat Venkataraju","updated_at":"2026-02-20T20:23:31Z"}

{"id":"Matter-M5CoreInk-Switch-894","title":"Write JD79653A e-ink SPI driver","description":"Implement main/eink_display.c — the minimal JD79653A driver for the GDEW0154M09 200×200 e-paper display on M5Stack Core Ink.","design":"- SPI3 (VSPI) host, 1 MHz, mode 0
- GPIO map: MOSI=23, SCK=18, CS=9, DC=15, RST=0, BUSY=4
- BUSY pin INVERTED: LOW=busy, HIGH=ready
- Two DMA-capable heap buffers (2×5000 bytes): s_buf (new) + s_old_buf (previous frame)
- Hardware reset: RST low 10ms → high 10ms
- Full JD79653A init sequence: Panel Setting, FitiPower internals, resolution, TCON, VCOM, power-on, 5 LUT tables
- Full refresh only (DTM1=old, DTM2=new, cmd 0x12, ~820ms)","acceptance_criteria":"eink_init(), eink_clear(), eink_set_pixel(), eink_fill_rect(), eink_refresh(), eink_power_off(), eink_deep_sleep() all compile and link","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"venkat.venkataraju@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-20T19:05:31Z","created_by":"Venkat Venkataraju","updated_at":"2026-02-20T19:05:31Z"}

{"id":"Matter-M5CoreInk-Switch-53g","title":"Write QR code renderer","description":"Implement main/qr_display.h + main/qr_display.c — encode Matter QR payload and render it to the e-ink framebuffer.","design":"- Use qrcodegen raw API (qrcodegen.h) from espressif/qrcode component
- Stack-allocate two 172-byte buffers (Version ≤5)
- qrcodegen_encodeText(), ECC_MEDIUM, Version MIN→5
- Expected output: Version 2 = 25×25 modules
- Scale=7px → 175×175px, centered with 12px margin on 200×200 display
- eink_clear(false) → iterate modules → eink_fill_rect() → eink_refresh()
- Single public function: esp_err_t qr_display_matter_code(const char *qr_string)","acceptance_criteria":"qr_display_matter_code("MT:-24J0S0.030UU741J00") compiles and renders without error","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"venkat.venkataraju@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-20T19:07:05Z","created_by":"Venkat Venkataraju","updated_at":"2026-02-20T19:07:05Z"}

{"id":"Matter-M5CoreInk-Switch-8hy","title":"Wire e-ink + QR display into app_main","description":"Integrate the e-ink and QR display into the boot sequence. Modify main/app_main.cpp and main/include/CHIPPairingConfig.h.","design":"CHIPPairingConfig.h: add #define CHIP_DEVICE_QR_CODE_STRING "MT:-24J0S0.030UU741J00" next to the existing comment so it stays in sync when make generate-pairing reruns.

app_main.cpp — after NVS init, before Matter start:
  eink_init()
  qr_display_matter_code(CHIP_DEVICE_QR_CODE_STRING)
  eink_power_off()   // display retains image; saves power

Error handling: if eink_init() fails (ESP_FAIL), log warning and continue booting — display is non-critical.","acceptance_criteria":"Device boots, shows QR on e-ink, then proceeds to start Matter stack normally","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"venkat.venkataraju@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-20T19:07:24Z","created_by":"Venkat Venkataraju","updated_at":"2026-02-20T19:07:24Z"}

{"id":"Matter-M5CoreInk-Switch-15b","title":"Fix e-ink SPI mode and reset sequence (Approach A)","description":"Fix critical SPI Mode 0→3 bug and incomplete reset sequence in eink_display.c. Update docs to match. Per the plan: SPI mode fix on line 193, reset HIGH→LOW→HIGH + wait_busy, 2ms DTM delays.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"venkat.venkataraju@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-21T02:09:00Z","created_by":"Venkat Venkataraju","updated_at":"2026-02-21T02:09:00Z"}

new_value: Applied Approach A: SPI mode 0→3, reset HIGH→LOW→HIGH + wait_busy, 2ms DTM delays. Build passes.
Not implementing a driver; using existing libraries instead
M5GFX display integration complete — hello world working on e-ink at boot
